title: pickpiff Self Adhesive Hooks, Sticky Hooks Extra Sturdy, Hanging up to 6KG, Metal Stainless Heavy Duty Stick on Wall Door, for Towel Coat Hat Purse in Bathroom Shower Kitchen, Black, 4 Pack
features: 【Hanging up to 6KG】with super sticky double-sided strips, this wall hook support really well !
【Stainless】can be used in the wet bathroom, the shower hooks would not fall off or rust for long-term use.
【Lifetime Service】 If you are not satisfied, please contact us by "Ask a question". We will help you solve the problem wholeheartedly
【Easy Use & Quick Installation】 It takes only seconds to install， NO drilling/ NO glue/ NO damage
【Widely Use Utility Hooks】Perfect for bathroom, living room, kitchen, hangers for clothes, umbrellas, towels, coats, robes, keys, backbackpackspack, hats, wreathswreath on door or wall etc..
description: 1. Before sticking， Please clean the wall and keep it dry ！ 2. Please wait for 24H after sticking before hanging things 3. NOT recommended for rough surfaces. (especially not for a painted wall that tends to powder and flake) 4. We value our product quality and customer experience very much! If you have any questions, don't hesitate to find us!
